questions.question: State the Pumping Lemma for context-free languages and explain its three main conditions.
expectedPoints: Formal statement: For any CFL L, ∃p such that ∀s∈L with |s|≥p, s=uvxyz satisfying:

questions.question: Using the Pumping Lemma, prove that the language L = {aⁿbⁿcⁿ | n ≥ 0} is not context-free.
expectedPoints: Assume L is context-free with pumping length p
Consider all possible cases for vxy based on |vxy|≤p
Case 1: vxy contains only a's - pumping disrupts count
Case 2: vxy contains only b's - pumping disrupts count
Case 3: vxy contains only c's - pumping disrupts count
Case 4: vxy contains a's and b's - pumping increases a's and b's but not c's
Case 5: vxy contains b's and c's - pumping increases b's and c's but not a's
Conclusion: contradiction in all cases, so L is not context-free
